define i16 @sext_both_arms_non_constant(i1 %cond, i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %sx = sext i8 %x to i32
  %sy = sext i8 %y to i32
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i32 %sx, i32 %sy
  %trunc = trunc i32 %sel to i16
  ret i16 %trunc
}

tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32"

define i8 @add_trunc_chain_both_non_constant(i1 %cond, i8 %a, i8 %b, i8 %c, i8 %d) {
  %add1 = add i8 %a, %b
  %add2 = add i8 %c, %d
  %ext1 = zext i8 %add1 to i32
  %ext2 = zext i8 %add2 to i32
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i32 %ext1, i32 %ext2
  %trunc = trunc i32 %sel to i8
  ret i8 %trunc
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32"

define i8 @add_trunc_chain_both_non_constant(i1 %cond, i8 %a, i8 %b, i8 %c, i8 %d) {
  %add1 = add i8 %a, %b
  %add2 = add i8 %c, %d
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i8 %add1, i8 %add2
  ret i8 %sel
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary shows single operation folding (trunc of zext), but this tests a chain where the select arms themselves are results of arithmetic operations (add). The generalization enables simplification through multiple operation layers.

tests.source_program:
define i32 @lshr_select_non_constant_arms(i1 %cond, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %shl_x = shl i32 %x, 4
  %shl_y = shl i32 %y, 4
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i32 %shl_x, i32 %shl_y
  %r = lshr i32 %sel, 4
  ret i32 %r
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions trunc/zext/fptrunc patterns but not lshr/shl cancellation. Both select arms are non-constant values (not constants), which the old constantFoldOperationIntoSelectOperand would reject. The new simplifyInstructionWithOperands enables algebraic simplification of shift operations.

alive2.src:
define i32 @lshr_select_non_constant_arms(i1 %cond, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %shl_x = shl i32 %x, 4
  %shl_y = shl i32 %y, 4
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i32 %shl_x, i32 %shl_y
  %r = lshr i32 %sel, 4
  ret i32 %r
}
alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i32 @lshr_select_non_constant_arms(i1 %cond, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %sel.v = select i1 %cond, i32 %x, i32 %y
  %sel = and i32 %sel.v, 268435455
  ret i32 %sel
}
